mapper.sql: id, order_id, payment,newpayment, lzx_fee, status, create_time, update_time, payment_time, consign_time, end_time, shipping_code, user_id, user_name, oripayment, ywx_fee, ywxtype,payment_type, selftraveltag, havesendmessage, specialservertag, lzxtype, locationtype,paymentusername, safetype, organid, majororganid, lzxcount, ywxcount, ywxper, lzxper,route,routeid,ticketnumber,walletpayment,tichengpayment,traveldays, routefrom,routeto,traveltotool,travelfromtool,provincehome,cityhome,tuancode,jidiaouser,needsynctag,policyid,version,temptag
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_order
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_order ( order_id, payment, newpayment, lzx_fee, status, create_time, update_time, payment_time, consign_time, end_time, shipping_code, user_id, user_name, oripayment, ywx_fee, ywxtype,payment_type, selftraveltag,havesendmessage, specialservertag, lzxtype, locationtype,paymentusername, safetype, organid, majororganid, lzxcount, ywxcount, ywxper, lzxper,route,routeid,policyid,ticketnumber,traveldays,routefrom,routeto,traveltotool,travelfromtool,provincehome,cityhome,tuancode,jidiaouser,temptag ) values ( #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{newpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{paymentusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{traveldays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{routefrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{routeto,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{traveltotool,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{travelfromtool,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provincehome,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityhome,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tuancode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jidiaouser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into tb_order
id,
order_id,
payment,
newpayment,
lzx_fee,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
payment_time,
consign_time,
end_time,
shipping_code,
user_id,
user_name,
oripayment,
ywx_fee,
ywxtype,
payment_type,
selftraveltag,
havesendmessage,
specialservertag,
lzxtype,
locationtype,
paymentusername,
safetype,
route,
routeid,
policyid,
ticketnumber,
organid,
majororganid,
lzxcount,
ywxcount,
ywxper,
lzxper,
temptag,

mapper.update:
update tb_order
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
payment = #{record.newpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzx_fee = #{record.lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_time = #{record.paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
consign_time = #{record.consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
shipping_code = #{record.shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oripayment = #{record.oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywx_fee = #{record.ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywxtype = #{record.ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_type = #{record.paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selftraveltag = #{record.selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
havesendmessage = #{record.havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{record.specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lzxtype = #{record.lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
locationtype = #{record.locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paymentusername = #{record.paymentusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
route = #{record.route,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
routeid = #{record.routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticketnumber= #{record.ticketnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxcount = #{record.lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxcount = #{record.ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxper = #{record.ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzxper = #{record.lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update tb_order set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, newpayment = #{record.newpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzx_fee = #{record.lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_time = #{record.paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, consign_time = #{record.consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{record.endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, shipping_code = #{record.shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oripayment = #{record.oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywx_fee = #{record.ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ywxtype = #{record.ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment_type = #{record.paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, selftraveltag = #{record.selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, havesendmessage = #{record.havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{record.specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lzxtype = #{record.lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, locationtype = #{record.locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paymentusername = #{record.paymentusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, route = #{record.route,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, routeid = #{record.routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ticketnumber = #{record.ticketnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, lzxcount = #{record.lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxcount = #{record.ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ywxper = #{record.ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, lzxper = #{record.lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL}

update tb_order
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
newpayment = #{newpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzx_fee = #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
consign_time = #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
shipping_code = #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oripayment = #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywx_fee = #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywxtype = #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selftraveltag = #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
havesendmessage = #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lzxtype = #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
needsynctag = #{needsynctag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
policyid = #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
locationtype = #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paymentusername = #{paymentusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
route = #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
routeid = #{routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticketnumber = #{ticketnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxcount = #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxcount = #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxper = #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzxper = #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
walletpayment = #{walletpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tichengpayment = #{tichengpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
traveldays = #{traveldays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
temptag = #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
routefrom = #{routefrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
routeto = #{routeto,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
traveltotool = #{traveltotool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
travelfromtool = #{travelfromtool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provincehome = #{provincehome,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cityhome = #{cityhome,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tuancode = #{tuancode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jidiaouser = #{jidiaouser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_order
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
newpayment = #{newpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzx_fee = #{lzxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
consign_time = #{consignTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
shipping_code = #{shippingCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oripayment = #{oripayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywx_fee = #{ywxFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ywxtype = #{ywxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment_type = #{paymentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selftraveltag = #{selftraveltag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
havesendmessage = #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
specialservertag = #{specialservertag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lzxtype = #{lzxtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
needsynctag = #{needsynctag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
policyid = #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
locationtype = #{locationtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paymentusername = #{paymentusername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
route = #{route,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
routeid = #{routeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticketnumber = #{ticketnumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
lzxcount = #{lzxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxcount = #{ywxcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ywxper = #{ywxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
lzxper = #{lzxper,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
walletpayment = #{walletpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tichengpayment = #{tichengpayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
traveldays = #{traveldays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
routefrom = #{routefrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
routeto = #{routeto,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
traveltotool = #{traveltotool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
travelfromtool = #{travelfromtool,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provincehome = #{provincehome,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cityhome = #{cityhome,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tuancode = #{tuancode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jidiaouser = #{jidiaouser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
temptag = #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = version+1
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and version = #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT}
